live_matches.match_title: Arsenal vs Atletico - Semi-Final - Leg 2 - 5 May 2026
live_matches.description: Arsenal host Atlético Madrid in a decisive Champions League semi‑final second leg after the first meeting in Spain ended 1–1, leaving everything to play for at the Emirates. The Gunners will look to dictate possession and tempo on home soil, while Atlético arrive primed to absorb pressure and strike on the counter, true to Simeone’s European blueprint. Which side will advance to the final? Tune in to catch all the action from UEFA Champions League 2025‑26, LIVE & exclusively on Sony LIV.
